verse.name: v1
verse.lines: 1. Rescue the perishing, care for the dying, snatch them in pity from sin and the grave; weep o'er the erring one, lift up the fallen, tell them of Jesus, the mighty to save.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Refrain: Rescue the perishing, care for the dying; Jesus is merciful, Jesus will save.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: 2. Though they are slighting Him, still He is waiting, waiting the penitent child to receive; plead with them earnestly, plead with them gently. He will forgive if they only believe.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: 3. Down in the human heart, crushed by the tempter, feelings lie buried that grace can restore; touched by a loving heart, wakened by kindness, chords that are broken will vibrate once more.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: 4. Rescue the perishing, duty demands it. Strength for thy labor the Lord will provide; back to the narrow way patiently win them, tell the poor wanderer a Savior has died.
